detail_desc:
A tall noble with sand-colored hair and goatee is strolling by with an
amiable but authoritative countenance.  Long out of knighthood, he nevertheless
looks quite confident in his abilities to defend himself, and has gone on to
wining, dining and governing the human population.
long_desc: The Earl of Sundhaven is out for a stroll.

detail_desc:
His swarthy human face is framed by well-combed dark hair that gazes about
with a relaxed, alert air.  He wears in his uniform the dark gold and black
colors of the town banner, and the sword that hangs from his hip looks more
than idle decoration.
long_desc: A guard of Sundhaven stands watchfully.

detail_desc:
This brawny, placid fellow is garbed in loose black garments and an
eye-patch, from his days as a pirate along the northern coast.  He has, of
course, since seen the light and sticks to legal murder.
long_desc: The town hangman is here, idly swinging a noose.

detail_desc:
The glow of candles half reveals a shadowy priest with dark features and a
somber but pleasant manner.  He carries a small kaleidoscope in one hand, with
which he watches the movements of his elusive deity.
long_desc: A black-robed priest is here, tending a candelabra.

detail_desc:
She looks entirely focused on her task of painting and numbering, yet pauses
to give you a nod as you pass in.  Her beauty, though great, is surpassed by
the swirl of etherous colors that she busies herself with.
long_desc: A black-robed priestess is charting a stellar calendar on the wall.

detail_desc:
Regarded in local myth as a bird of prophecy, it regards you with one eye as
it passes over.
long_desc: A shadow passes along the ground something flies overhead.

detail_desc: It slinks quickly from your vision, apparently nervous about eye contact.
long_desc: A smoke-colored rat sits in the shadows.

detail_desc:
Catching you spotting him, he gives you a quick grin and a friendly nudge.
Better check your pockets.
long_desc: You sense someone lurking about.

detail_desc:
She is garbed in a peasant's frock and carries a basket of blackberries.
Black hair frames a gentle face and broad gray eyes accustomed to hardship.
She gives you a shy smile and feigns interest in a fray of her sleeve.
long_desc: A blackberry picker is singing among the bushes.

detail_desc:
A short, slender being with wary and mirthful eyes barely gives your
kneecaps a second glance.  He seems engaged in drawing the eyes of persons of
wealth.  He wears a tray of spices and other goods on a strap around his neck.
long_desc: A halfling peddler is here calling his wares.

detail_desc:
You are absorbed by the foul smell of his ragged body, but take pity; there
are worse odors among the wild regions of the vast world.
long_desc: A mendicant in rags shoves a cup in your face.

detail_desc:
His shining armor and sword of silver are so stainless that you wonder if he
merely has a master blacksmith, or an overactive imagination.
long_desc: A knight in bright armor is telling tales in a roaring voice.

detail_desc:
He appears to be hanging on his lord's every word, but when watched closely
seems to pay more attention to his cold mug of ale.
long_desc: An eager squire stands attendant.

detail_desc:
She has a beauty that fascinates the eye, but she shows about as much
interest in you as an empty keg.
long_desc: A foreign princess is downing shots at the bar.

detail_desc:
She is clad in the brightest colors; red, gold, purple and orange compete
for the attention of the eye.  She has thrown down his feathered cap and seems
ready for donations.
long_desc: A gypsy minstrel bows a fiddle nearby.

detail_desc:
He notices you checking him out, bounces up into your face, and begins
reciting bad poetry.  He looks suspiciously like someone you know.
long_desc: The village idiot is dancing about.

detail_desc:
She is tall, elderly and imposing, but willing to teach those new to her
priestly arts.  The black gown that she wears flows past her toes to the stone
floor.
long_desc: The Priestess of the Ministry is here, garbed in black.

detail_desc:
You see but a blur in the shadow that is the keeper of the Black Naga
assassins guild.  She is willing to train newcomers to her roguish trade, after
that you must search elsewhere for learnings.
long_desc: The Mistress of Assassins comes half out of the shadow.

detail_desc:
A swarthy man clad in the padded armor standard for training newcomers.
Thick auburn hair and beard frame a face intelligent in battle.
long_desc: The Knightmaster fingers his beard and ponders you.

detail_desc:
His violet robes have long frayed and faded, his beard is long and tapering,
but his powers have only grown throughout the years.  He is willing to teach
his mystical arts to newcomers.
long_desc: The Archmage watches you through a crystal ball as you arrive.

detail_desc:
This plump fellow leads a quiet life.  Nevertheless the odd creatures that
find their way to this bar from all lands have had an effect on him.  He
glances up and gives you a lopsided grin as he mumbles to the floor.
long_desc: The bartender is here doing his thing.

detail_desc:
Having retired from the bounty lists, this thief spends his days managing
the Nightbreak Cafe for the assassins guild.  So may you, if you become
addicted enough to caffeine.
long_desc: A retired thief cleans a shot glass behind the counter.

detail_desc:
His tall, noble bearing seems to go hand in hand with the alert postures of
his taloned birds.  A magnificent white kestrel stares at you from his left
shoulder.
long_desc: The falconer stands proudly before several cages.

detail_desc:
Thin and wisp-haired, this old man regards you with a wily grin and looks
ready to cut some deals.  There is a rumor he was kicked out of the mages
guild for fraud.  Can you trust his goods?
long_desc: The cartographer grins at you over wire-rimmed spectacles.

detail_desc: This little man has found his bliss.
long_desc: The town treasurer sits happily on a huge pile of gold.

detail_desc:
This ex-warrior is short and brawny, looks to have some dwarf ancestry.  He
is carrying a hot poker though, better not mess with him.
long_desc: The blacksmith stands in the glare of the fire.

detail_desc:
The jeweller is a dark-skinned woman in a silken frock.  She seems to be
doing very well for herself.  A black gem sparkles dimly round her neck.
long_desc: The jeweller stands behind a glass case of rubies.

detail_desc:
This local witch comes from desert lands and is making her fortune off the
superstitious.  Her dark eyes look sharply into yours in the mirror on the far
wall.  Her black hair and turban remind you of her exotic origins.
long_desc: Phadela is here grinning maniacally in a mirror.

detail_desc:
A round, short fellow covered in flour.  He looks content as a mouse in a
corn shed, snacking on his sticky creations perpetually.
long_desc: The hobbit pastry chef rolls some dough behind the counter.

detail_desc:
He is withered as a gnarled tree, but seems wise in a mad sort of way.
Glass vials of all colors surround him, attesting to his knowledge.
long_desc: The old alchemist stands here preparing bubbling vials.

detail_desc:
An old silver haired woman levitates and sings to herself as she reshelves
tomes and organizes scrolls and parchments.
long_desc: The wise magess flies about the shop.

detail_desc:
This young, dark woman has traveled far from jungle lands to prepare her
spicy-hot dishes for this heavily traversed town.  She sings a foreign song in
a bizarre, guttural tongue.
long_desc: Mekala tosses some pad thai in a pan nearby.

detail_desc:
The cousin of the warrior guildmaster is six foot five and perhaps three
hundred pounds..  Needless to say, he has many friends.  He stands rose-buffing
a beautiful suit of scale mail.
long_desc: The armorer is here buffing a suit of scale mail.

detail_desc:
He's a wiry little fellow, but agile as a squirrel.  He prefers to be left
alone in the world of blade artistry, and generally people grant him his wish
with pleasure.
long_desc: The weaponsmaster sharpens a kris at the back wall.

detail_desc:
She looks a little bored, and pleased to see you, hoping for a big sale.
You cringe as she gives you a warm toothless smile.
long_desc: A little old lady hovers around you.

detail_desc:
She cocks her head from side to side, studying you rapidly, then does an
impression that looks very familiar and makes your friends crack up laughing.
long_desc: A gray and white mockingbird mimics you from an oak branch.

detail_desc:
His bug eyes and electric hair show you he has perhaps seen to many beasts,
and they were too much for him.
long_desc: A paranoid adventurer hides within the town walls, afraid to leave.

detail_desc:
The fact that he has been about many lands shows on his weathered, scarred
face.  When he notes you looking him over he smiles cunningly and shows you a
variety of colored silk goods.
long_desc: A silk trader is strolling, looking for business.

detail_desc:
His small, darting eyes are set off by a mess of tousled black hair.  Ever
since his sling shot was taken away, he has been playing with torches.
long_desc: A mischievous boy is looking for something to set on fire.

detail_desc:
This small girl has a fine dress and precocious look that makes you feel she
must be a wealthy citizen's daughter, perhaps a merchant or judge.
long_desc: A dark-haired girl is eyeing you curiously.

detail_desc:
She looks plump from plenty of good eating.  Her wide green eyes are fixated
on a fluttering mockingbird, the stripes of her thick black and brown fur
mingling with the lines of the grasses.
long_desc: A tabby cat is stalking a mockingbird.

detail_desc:
His white beard trails down to his withered toes.  His forehead is creased
in contemplation, but a wine-induced smile plays on his lips.
long_desc: An old mage studies the chessboard in rapt contemplation.

detail_desc:
This brawny fellow hops about, rather gracelessly, shadow-boxing.  He is too
absorbed to notice you watching him.
long_desc: A young warrior is sparring with his shadow.

detail_desc:
He doesn't look too nervous about being found and brutally hung for his
crimes.  With his feet up and margarita in hand, he kicks back in an easy chair
and thumbs through a magazine.
long_desc: A thief is lounging, hiding out from the bounty hunters.

detail_desc:
She is busy anointing a serrated dagger with a special balm, and sprinkling
a dark water over the animal.  She asks that you take a seat and keep quiet.
long_desc: A priestess is preparing a blindfolded animal for sacrifice.

detail_desc:
Some black animal, its hard to tell exactly what in this darkness, is
chained to the back wall.  Even its eyes are darkened as a black fold of cloth
covers them until the moment of its departure from the world.
long_desc: An iron chain rattles as something moves in the back of the room.

detail_desc:
He seems vaguely interested in something beyond the range of your five
senses, as cats often are.
long_desc: A gray cat pads around, sniffing things.

detail_desc:
He's a beautiful creature, with a long snow-colored coat tinged with gold in
the sunlight.  His eyes are closed as he lies in bliss in the heat.
long_desc: A large white cat is sunning himself on a wall.

detail_desc:
This overweight fellow looks bloodthirsty and bored with life.  As you enter
he hurls several sharp meat cleavers around the edge of the door without
looking up.
long_desc: The town butcher tosses meat cleavers about listlessly.

detail_desc:
He was apparently chosen for his inability to blink.  He is a brawny fellow,
but doesn't strike you as having the froth-mouthed drive to fight as seen in the
town guards.
long_desc: The gate watchman stares glass-eyed at the horizon.

detail_desc:
The tiny metal clasp round a leg of this diminutive bird tells you it is
someone's pet.  It regards you with one eye then the other in a nervous
fashion, awaiting its first chance to fly to freedom.
long_desc: A little sparrow pecks at the ground.

detail_desc:
The blackbird sports glossy dark feathers with wings tipped in crimson, and
a keen eye.  The small metal clasp round one leg tells you it is someone's
trained pet.
long_desc: A red-winged blackbird is preening nearby.

detail_desc:
The kestrel's plumage is pale as lamb's down, making it a beautiful animal,
but the sharp curved beak and arched talons remind you of its predatory habits.
A tiny metal ring is clasped round one leg..  It must be someone's pet.
long_desc: A giant white kestrel is perched near its master.

detail_desc:
Athos wears a face of sorrow on his noble countenance, displaying only a few
quiet words of philosophy when his tongue is loosened by drink.  His dress
depicts a man of learning and his voice one of some foul experience.
Something - or someone - still haunts him to this day.
long_desc: Athos the great knight is somberly nursing a bottle of wine.

detail_desc:
Milady de Winter is a slender form draped in white ermine and knowledgeable
in the ways of enchantment.  Golden hair falls to her waist, her eyes are cyan
blue and widened with anger, or perhaps a tinge of fear.  Long presumed dead,
she wears one of many guises and is accustomed to discarding lives.
long_desc: A beautiful woman with fair hair flares angrily up at your intrusion.

detail_desc:
The guardian naga is a serpent-like creature, coal-black scales shield an
elongate body with the head of a woman, and make no sound with her curious
writhing.  It looks intelligent enough to judge whether you are worthy to pass
into the guild of rogues that is its keeping.
long_desc: The black naga guardian is coiled here.

detail_desc:
It's a brawny beast, measuring six feet at the shoulder, and staring
passively at you with cold red eyes.  It watches faithfully over the guild of
physical battle that is its charge; only those worthy may enter.
long_desc: A large guardian gryphon sits immobile before you.

detail_desc:
The guardian stands motionless with eyes of stone fixed on the far wall.
Nonetheless, this reptile, a figure born of a cold wisdom, knows well enough if
you are worthy to pass into the guild of priests.
long_desc: A basilisk summoned from the ether guards a doorway.

detail_desc:
This is the familiar of the Archmage of the town, at present an ill- meaning
sort of ruler.  It is charged with the worthy task of defending the guild from
unwelcome intruders.  Its wickedly curving horns and innocuous teeth attest to
its ability to....  Well, dispose of you.
long_desc: A horned imp is crouched nearby, unfolding its wings.

detail_desc:
A handsome, stalwart warrior of the famed elite guard of Sundhaven keeps a
tireless watch over the peace of the town.
long_desc: A warrior of the Black Watch maintains a alert vigilance here.
short_desc: a warrior of the Black Watch

detail_desc:
The captain of the Black Watch, the well-known anti-rogue force of
Sundhaven, seems a fairly complacent noble confident in his own strength.  He
surveys his surroundings casually over the rim of a glass of strong drink.
long_desc: The Lord of the Black Watch keeps the peace as he sips a scotch.
short_desc: the Lord of the Black Watch

detail_desc:
His blank eyes, the color long lost, leave the broad sky and seem to stare
right through you.  His sanity, also long lost, might have made him a fine
fellow once, but he would best be left alone now.
long_desc: A blind mage is sitting here, communing with nature.

detail_desc:
A giant leech-like movement under the water marks the outline of a lamprey,
skin wet and oil-black.  The row of teeth that gapes for an instant above the
waterline gives a hint of its hunger for prey in this deserted place.
long_desc: Something makes an eel-like motion under the water.

detail_desc:
The moth, pale downy white in color, beats its wings heavily above some
ferns nearby.  It seems quite harmless.
long_desc: A small moth flits about nearby.

detail_desc:
The gray and strained eyes of the courier look at you with ill-concealed
lack of interest.  The scars on his face are an indication that he has seen
foul weather of all sorts on the roads, and nothing you could request would
surprise him.
long_desc: A disgruntled courier awaits your bidding.

detail_desc:
The noble is tall, of fair hair and complexion, and dressed in gold-bordered
finery.  He appears unaware of your presence, and preoccupied with his own
affairs.
long_desc: A Sundhaven noble stares past you with an aloof air.

detail_desc: Achhh!  Dont pay too much attention to him or you'll regret it.
long_desc: Stu the Recruit is standing here.
